subject: Server completely down!
body: Our production database is unreachable. All our customers are getting 500 errors. We need help immediately!

subject: How to change my password?
body: Hi, I forgot my password and the reset link isn't arriving in my email. Can someone assist?

subject: Billing discrepancy
body: I was charged $49.99 this month but my plan is only $29.99. Please refund the difference.

subject: Feature request: Dark mode
body: It would be really cool if your dashboard had a dark mode. My eyes hurt at night.

subject: System glitch maybe?
body: Sometimes when I click the blue button, it does a weird thing, but I can't really explain it. Just thought you should know.
